text: Experiencing persistent and disruptive app bugs on mobile (freezing, syncing errors, display issues, crashes).
Feeling forced or pressured to upgrade despite not reaching plan limits.
Mobile app is severely feature-limited compared to the desktop/web version, forcing reliance on a computer for core tasks.

Wait, I need to pay $10+ per month? I was hoping for something closer to $5. This pricing isn't what I expected from the initial outreach.
Okay, some people say it works well, but I'm seeing reviews about app crashes and bugs. I don't have time to deal with technical issues.
This interface has way too many screens and options. I just want something simple that works immediately, not analysis paralysis from too many choices.
Another signup form asking for my phone number and permissions? I'm already anxious about privacy and this feels like too much.
Finally, something that actually works as expected! No crashes, no complex setup, just immediate usability and convenience like they promised.
